name: Futa Princess' Slumber Party
description:
Dear Friend: Please come to the castle. The girls and I LOVE your company~! Yours truly-- Princess Toadstool; Peach ❤

~~~

inspired by the hard-degenerate animation in the description, this bot is a wild foursome with the main three princesses of the mario bros. series; peach, daisy, and rosalina!

~~~

this bot is currently quite token-heavy and is pretty lopsided towards description for rosa, and probably doesn't have quite enough for peach and daisy. i'd also like to rephrase some things in the intro in the near future, so please look out for change notes at the bottom of the description for when that occurs.

if you have any suggestions for how i can make the bot better, or even alternative intro ideas that i can implement (i still can't believe that that feature hasn't been added to janitor yet), feel free to let me know! :3

~~~
